name: The Sinai Trail Expedition
summary: Breathtaking hike through the Sinai mountains and Saint Catherine region
description:
Follow ancient routes through the dramatic granite peaks of Sinai, guided by local Bedouins who know every valley and viewpoint. Hike to the summit of Mount Sinai for a golden sunrise, wander through narrow wadis, and visit the historic Saint Catherine Monastery.
Simple camp-style overnights, shared meals around the fire, and stories under the stars create an authentic mountain experience. This expedition is ideal for travelers who want gentle hiking, rich history, and deep cultural connection in a short escape.

name: Red Sea Diving & Snorkeling
summary: Explore the crystal-clear Red Sea by boat and discover vibrant coral reefs
description:
Spend a full week exploring the best dive and snorkel sites of the Red Sea. Cruise by boat to protected reefs, drift above colorful coral gardens, and swim alongside turtles, rays, and tropical fish in warm, transparent waters.
Evenings are spent relaxing on deck as the sun sets over the mountains, with plenty of time to enjoy Hurghada’s marina and seaside cafés. This tour is perfect for ocean lovers who want a mix of adventure, comfort, and picture-perfect underwater memories.

name: White Desert Safari & Camping
summary: Camp under the stars among surreal chalk rock formations in Egypt's White Desert
description:
Venture deep into the White Desert, where wind-carved chalk formations rise like sculptures from the sand. Travel by 4x4 through otherworldly landscapes, stopping at natural wonders such as Crystal Mountain and remote desert camps.
At night, you sleep in tents beneath an incredible blanket of stars, far from city lights. This adventurous safari combines off-road excitement, unique photo opportunities, and the peaceful silence of Egypt’s most surreal desert.

name: Historic Cairo Walking Tour
summary: Walk through millennia of history: pyramids, Khan El Khalili, and Islamic Cairo
description:
Discover Cairo’s layered history in a journey that begins at the Giza Pyramids and Sphinx, then leads into the vibrant streets of the modern city. Visit museums, mosques, and markets, including the legendary Khan El Khalili bazaar with its spices, lanterns, and handicrafts.
From ancient monuments to hidden alleyways, your guide reveals the stories behind the stones. This walking-focused tour is ideal for curious travelers who want to see both the famous landmarks and the everyday life of the city.

name: Luxor & Valley of the Kings
summary: Discover ancient temples and royal tombs in the heart of pharaonic Egypt
description:
Step into the golden age of the pharaohs with ten days exploring Luxor and the Valley of the Kings. Wander through the towering columns of Karnak and Luxor temples, then cross the Nile to uncover royal tombs carved deep into the cliffs.
Along the way, you’ll visit Hatshepsut’s elegant temple and quiet villages on the West Bank, with plenty of time for guided explanations and free exploration. This tour is designed for history lovers who want to truly immerse themselves in ancient Egypt.

name: Red Sea Adventures
summary: Diving, kite surfing, windsurfing, and desert safari on the Red Sea coast
description:
Spend two unforgettable weeks based in Dahab and along the Red Sea coast, combining water sports with desert adventure. Dive or snorkel world-class sites like the Blue Hole and Ras Abu Galum, then switch to kite surfing or windsurfing in calm lagoons.
On land, you’ll join 4x4 safaris, visit remote beaches, and spend evenings in relaxed seaside cafés. This tour is perfect for active travelers who want variety, adrenaline, and time to truly get to know the Red Sea region.

name: Fayoum Oasis & Wadi El Rayan
summary: Lakes, waterfalls, and desert scenery in the Fayoum depression
description:
Discover Fayoum’s unique mix of water and desert, from the calm shores of Lake Qarun to the cascading falls of Wadi El Rayan. Travel through small villages, meet local artisans in Tunis Village, and enjoy panoramic views over dunes and wetlands.
With gentle walks, boat rides, and time to relax by the water, this tour offers a soft adventure close to Cairo. It’s a great choice for families, photographers, and anyone who loves diverse landscapes in a short getaway.

name: Siwa Oasis Stargazing
summary: Remote desert nights and crystal-clear skies in Egypt's western oasis
description:
Escape to the remote beauty of Siwa Oasis, where palm groves, salt lakes, and sand dunes create a peaceful desert world. Swim in natural springs like Cleopatra’s Bath, explore ancient ruins and temples, and experience traditional Siwan culture.
At night, you head out to the Great Sand Sea for unforgettable stargazing, far from any light pollution. This tour is a relaxing, atmospheric journey for travelers who love quiet landscapes, local traditions, and magical night skies.

name: Sinai Desert Camp & Stargazing
summary: Bedouin-style camping and pristine night skies in the Sinai desert
description:
Leave the coast behind and journey into the heart of the Sinai Desert, where golden dunes and rugged mountains meet the sky. Settle into a traditional Bedouin camp, share freshly cooked meals by the fire, and learn about local desert life from your hosts.
When night falls, you’ll lie back under an intense canopy of stars, with telescopes and guidance to spot constellations and planets. This short escape is ideal if you want a calm, intimate experience with nature and the night sky.
